title: elatine glomerata
intro: Elatine glomerata, also known as the round-leaved elatine, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elatine glomerata include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues. Elatine glomerata can be prepared as an herbal infusion, a decoction, or a tincture, and is often used to treat a range of health issues due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties.
